title: TownProject
description: A small modpack for friends to build a town in a semi vanilla fantasy minecraft world.
body:
This is a semi-vanilla fantasy modpack with the focus on building a town with friends in a SMP world. it is mainly designed to experience 1.21.1 with some added magic mods and some quality of life mods like supplimentaries and a few redstone mods. 

Main Changes!
- Ability to revive fallen players
- Magic system
- Trims now have extra buffs
- New world gen
- Harder mobs and a few extra boss fights
- Various crafting recipe changes
- Harder end game
